description: LTX-2.3 22B task-aware VIDEO RESTORATION & EDITING — joyfox's 'ICEdit-Insight'. One model, four jobs via task IC-LoRA adapters on the standard LTX-2.3 dev checkpoint: (1) general restoration / artifact + noise cleanup, (2) HD super-resolution / detail recovery, (3) watermark removal, (4) hard-subtitle removal. It's generative (latent-space), so it reconstructs content behind logos/text using spatial + temporal context while preserving motion, identity and timing. Graph: Valiant-Cat/LTX2-ICEdit-Insight 'comfyui model version' (official-model variant, flat). Pick the task with the `task` knob (default = HD super-resolution).

about.what: Cleans up and rebuilds a video four ways (pick one): repair old/degraded footage, boost it to HD/super-resolution, remove a watermark/logo, or erase burned-in subtitles — reconstructing what's behind them while keeping the people, motion and timing.
about.inputs: One video clip, and the task you want (restore / HD / watermark removal / subtitle removal).
about.key_knobs: Task — which of the four jobs. Prompt — a short line describing the clean result you want (the defaults are tuned per task).

_TEMPLATE: READY-TO-RUN. All weights ungated, pinned. Runs the 4 task adapters on the STANDARD LTX-2.3 22B fp8 checkpoint (Lightricks/LTX-2.3-fp8) + the rank-384 distilled LoRA + the single-file gemma fp8 encoder. The 4 task adapters are joyfox's '-general' files, downloaded UNDER the filenames the graph's IC-LoRA loaders expect (no graph edit): the active loader is node 5011. Run --convert-only FIRST (it clones the 9 node packs and surfaces any missing class).
_TASKS:
The `task` knob sets node 5011's adapter. Four values (all downloaded):
  - ltx2.3-train/ltx2.3-video-upscale-v2.safetensors      (HD super-resolution — DEFAULT)
  - ltx2.3-train/ltx2.3-video-restoration.safetensors     (general restoration / de-artifact)
  - ltx2.3-train/ltx2.3-ic-watermarkeRM-v2.safetensors    (watermark / logo removal)
  - ltx2.3-train/ltx2.3-ic-subtitles-remove.safetensors   (hard-subtitle removal)
CLI: --set 5011.inputs.lora_name=ltx2.3-train/ltx2.3-video-restoration.safetensors (etc). Tune the prompt to match the task.
_PROMPT: The graph routes its prompt through a Comfyroll 'CR Prompt Text' node (5132, a Chinese super-res prompt) into the positive CLIPTextEncode (2483). This preset's `prompt` param sets 2483.inputs.text DIRECTLY (a literal overrides the incoming link), so your English prompt is used and the CR Prompt Text node is pruned. Describe the CLEAN result you want.
_HOWITRUNS: No-build path: public yanwk image, comfy_run.py clones the 9 node packs, downloads the weights, converts UI->API, patches the task adapter + prompt + input video, and renders. Heavy cold start (22B fp8 ~24GB + gemma ~12GB + adapters). The graph is flat (no subgraph). rtxpro6000 recommended.
_NODEPACKS: 9 packs; most are utility/preprocessing (image scale, prompt text, seed, image size). The ambiguous class 'LayerUtility: ImageScaleByAspectRatio V2' is taken from ComfyUI_LayerStyle (chflame163). If --convert-only flags a missing class, add/adjust the pack.

ui.title: LTX-2.3 Restore — task-aware video restoration / HD / watermark + subtitle removal

primary_input.label: Video to restore
primary_input.tooltip: The clip to repair / upscale / clean. The chosen task adapter reconstructs the result while keeping motion, identity and timing. Default frame_load_cap is 121 (~5s at 24fps).

ui.label: Task adapter
ui.tooltip: Which restoration job. One of: ltx2.3-train/ltx2.3-video-upscale-v2.safetensors (HD super-res, default); .../ltx2.3-video-restoration.safetensors (general restore); .../ltx2.3-ic-watermarkeRM-v2.safetensors (watermark removal); .../ltx2.3-ic-subtitles-remove.safetensors (subtitle removal). All four are downloaded; pick one.

prompt.default: Restore and enhance this video: remove compression artifacts and noise, reconstruct sharp high-frequency detail and clean natural texture, preserve the people, scene, motion, camera movement and timing exactly.

ui.label: Prompt (clean result)
ui.tooltip: Describe the CLEAN result you want for the chosen task. For watermark/subtitle removal, describe the clean underlying scene. (Overrides the graph's built-in CR Prompt Text.)

negative.default: pc game, console game, video game, ugly, 3d render, photo, still, static, slow
